calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Off Calendar

White Oak Clobal Advisors, Llcs Application To Schedule Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael J. Betz, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WHITE OAKD GLOBAL ADVISORS, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BOWIE REFINED COAL, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Darius Mozzaffarian sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

$169,189.00 in transaction related fees and costs and $15,445.94 in attorneys' fees and costs.
Total Judgment in the amount of $184,634.94
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Exhibit To Declaration Under Seal
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF WHITE OAK GLOBAL ADVISORS, LLC'S Motion To File Exhibit To Declaration Under Seal is granted, no opposition filed and the motion complies with CRC 2.550 et seq. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
